title: Viduus
description: Viduus is my attempt at trying to enhance the Vanilla experience with mods.
body:
**NOTICE:** This modpack uses mods that are on Modrinth, and five mods that are on CurseForge. The CurseForge mods are as follows: - [Backpacked (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) - [Cupboard (Library Mod for Loot Integrations)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard) - [Framework (Library Mod for Backpacked)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) - [Loot Integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations) - [Yung's Structure Addon for Loot Integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yung-structures-addon-for-loot-integrations) Viduus is my personal take on adding RPG features into Minecraft Some of the mods to help achieve that feeling are: **New Content:** - New Dimensions and Biome Edits: AdventureZ & VoidZ, Beneath The Wetlands, Deeper and Darker. - Combat and Weapons: Simply Swords, Marium's Soulslike Weaponry, WizardZ & Addons. - Economy and Currency: Numismatic Currency Overhaul, Universal Shops. - Technology and Automation: Create, Automobility. - Mob Overhauls: Illager Overhauls (Frostiful / Illager Invasions). - Dungeon and Adventure Mods: Mine Cells, Yung's Better Collection, When Dungeons Arise **Multiplayer Friendly!**
[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) is included into the pack so each player has their own instanced loot from chests! Play with your friends easily with the [Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod included!
